text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan feels immense pressure in the
presence of Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross—the
two strongest runners of the moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seemingly unperturbed, and perhaps even eager
to experience their prowess first-hand, she
readies herself to brave the race.
